title: ANGIX 20 x Gold Metallic Gift Bows Self Adhesive Decorative Beautiful Gift Wrapping Pull Bows For Christmas, New Year & Party Presents
features: 🎄 𝗙𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗖𝗵𝗿𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗺𝗮𝘀 𝗪𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗕𝗼𝘄𝘀 :- Add sparkle to your Christmas 2025 presents with these premium gold metallic gift bows, perfect for wrapping gifts for kids, family & friends.
🎁 𝗦𝗲𝗹𝗳-𝗔𝗱𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗶𝘃𝗲 & 𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝗨𝘀𝗲 :- Each bow comes with a strong peel & stick backing, making gift wrapping fast, mess-free & tape-free.
🌟 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗶𝘂𝗺 𝗠𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗰 𝗙𝗶𝗻𝗶𝘀𝗵 :- Glossy gold bows give your presents a luxury festive look, making every gift box stand out under the tree.
✨ 𝟮𝟬 𝗣𝗮𝗰𝗸 𝗩𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗲 𝗦𝗲𝘁 :- Plenty of bows for wrapping multiple presents - ideal for Christmas, birthdays, weddings, parties, baby showers & more.
🔔 𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗲 & 𝗠𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶-𝗣𝘂𝗿𝗽𝗼𝘀𝗲 𝗨𝘀𝗲𝘀 :- Not just for Christmas presents - these bows are great for hampers, holiday décor, party favors, Secret Santa, DIY crafts & gift baskets all year round.
